sections.paragraph:
ἐξίστημι, also ἐξιστάνω/ἐξιστάω [s. ἵστημι] in general ἐ. expresses the idea of causing or undergoing a psychological change suggesting demeanor or impressionableness outside normal expectation

—1. tr. ‘make a profound impression on by astonishing’, amaze Lk 24:22; Ac 8:9, 11.

—2. intr. (2 aor. and pf. act., all formed fr. the mid.)

—a. be out of one’s mind Mk 3:21; 2 Cor 5:13.

—b. be amazed, be overwhelmed Mt 12:23; Mk 2:12; Lk 8:56; Ac 2:7, 12; 8:13.
